docs.title: Home
docs.text:
Star Citizen version: 4.8.x

This website help you navigate through the Wikelo missions.

docs.title: ASD Secure Drive
docs.text:
To get ASD Secure Drive you need to complete some missions in Stanton.

See https://scmdb.net/ and search ASD Secure Drive to see all the missions.

docs.title: Ace Interceptor Helmet
docs.text: The Ace Interceptor Helmet can be found in the Orange Level Contract: Security Patrol on Ace pilot.

docs.title: Carinite
docs.text:
The Carinite is a resource that can be mined in Hator facilities.

There is two variation of it:

  • Carinite
  • Carinite (Pure)

docs.title: Council Scrip
docs.text:
To get Council Scrip you need to complete some missions across the verse.

See https://scmdb.net/ and search Council Scrip to see all the missions.

docs.title: DCHS 05 Comp Board
docs.text: The DCHS-05 Comp-Board can be found in the Contested Zones of Ruin Station on Pyro.

docs.title: Hyperion
docs.text:
The Project Hyperion is the final mission of the Onyx facilities.

At the end of the mission you will be rewarded by one of the following:

  • RCMBNT-PWL-1
  • RCMBNT-PWL-2
  • RCMBNT-PWL-3
  • RCMBNT-RGL-1
  • RCMBNT-RGL-2
  • RCMBNT-RGL-3
  • RCMBNT-XTL-1
  • RCMBNT-XTL-2
  • RCMBNT-XTL-3

docs.title: Irradiated Valakkar Fang
docs.text:
The Irradiated Valakkar Fang is a resource that can be colected in many places for each type of fang.

There may be other places to find the Fangs, create a merge request if you have other palces to share.

Apex:

  • Lazarus Complexes

Adult:

  • Lazarus Complexes

Juvenile:

  • Lazarus Complexes

docs.title: Irradiated Valakkar Pearl
docs.text:
The Irradiated Valakkar Pearl is a resource that can be mined in the Lazarus Complexes in Pyro.

There is two variation of it:

  • Irradiated Valakkar Pearl (Grade AA)
  • Irradiated Valakkar Pearl (Grade AAA)

docs.title: Jaclium
docs.text: The Saldynium is a resource that can be mined in Hator facilities.

docs.title: Kopion
docs.text:
There is multiple places were you can find Kopions:

Name Places Cave Kopion Bloom Forest Kopion Microtech Savannah Kopion Hurston Tundra Kopion Microtech Irradiated Kopion Onyx Facilities

docs.title: MG Scrip
docs.text:
To get MG Scrip you need to complete some missions across the verse.

See https://scmdb.net/ and search MG Scrip to see all the missions.

docs.title: Medal
docs.text:
Most all Medal (Pristine) can be found in the Orange Level Contract: Security Patrol on Ace pilot it can olso be found in open world activities (ex: Hator).

The Large Artifact Fragment (Pristine) can only be found in the Vanduul-Tech Smugglers or Retrieve Additional Smuggler Intel missions on Nyx.

docs.title: Sadaryx
docs.text: The Sadaryx can be mined in the caves of the QV Breaker Station Mining Rights missions on Nyx.

docs.title: Saldynium
docs.text: The Saldynium is a resource that can be mined in Hator facilities.

docs.title: Savrilium
docs.text: The Savrilium can be mined on QV Breaker Station Mining Rights missions on Nyx.

docs.title: Vanduul
docs.text: The Vanduul Plating and Vanduul Metal can be found on Vanduul corpses in the site B of the Vanduul-Tech Smugglers or Retrieve Additional Smuggler Intel missions on Nyx.

docs.title: Yormandi
docs.text: The Yormandi Eye and the Yormandi Tongue can be found on the Onyx facilities.
